gloss.en: a written promise to repair or replace a product

words.example: The phone comes with a one-year warranty.

gloss.en: a bowl or basin for washing your hands and face

words.example: She filled the washbowl with warm water.

gloss.en: no longer needed and thrown away

words.example: the disposal of waste material

gloss.en: using more than is needed

words.example: It is wasteful to throw away good food.

gloss.en: the clear liquid that falls as rain and we drink

words.example: a glass of water

gloss.en: water falling from a high place over rocks

words.example: We hiked to a beautiful waterfall in the forest.

gloss.en: a raised line of water moving on the sea

words.example: Huge waves were breaking on the shore.

gloss.en: a soft solid that melts when heated, used for candles

words.example: The candle was made of yellow wax.

gloss.en: an object used for fighting or attacking someone

words.example: The police found a weapon at the scene.

gloss.en: a small camera connected to a computer

words.example: We talked face to face using a webcam.

gloss.en: to have a particular weight

words.example: How much do you weigh?

gloss.en: accepted or wanted somewhere

words.example: You are always welcome at my house.

gloss.en: wearing smart, attractive clothes

words.example: A well-dressed man entered the room.

gloss.en: toward the west

words.example: The ship sailed westward across the sea.

gloss.en: toward the west

words.example: They travelled westwards for many days.

gloss.en: an area of land that is wet and soft

words.example: Many birds live in the wetland near the river.

gloss.en: a very large animal that lives in the sea

words.example: We saw a huge whale jump out of the water.

gloss.en: at any time that; every time that

words.example: You can ask for help whenever you need it.

gloss.en: used to express a doubt or choice between possibilities

words.example: He seemed undecided whether to go or stay.

gloss.en: any one or any number from a group

words.example: Choose whichever colour you like best.

gloss.en: during the time that something is happening

words.example: We must have been burgled while we were asleep.

gloss.en: a small object that makes a loud high sound

words.example: The referee blew his whistle to start the game.

gloss.en: full; complete

words.example: Let's forget the whole thing.

gloss.en: in an uncontrolled or very strong way

words.example: The crowd cheered wildly when the team scored.

gloss.en: a strong, determined desire to do something

words.example: She has a strong will to succeed.

gloss.en: the glass window at the front of a car

words.example: Rain hit the windscreen as we drove.

gloss.en: the sport of riding on water on a board with a sail

words.example: We went windsurfing at the beach last summer.

gloss.en: the body part a bird or insect uses to fly

words.example: The swan flapped its wings noisily.

gloss.en: to become dry and die, as a plant does

words.example: The flowers will wither without water.

gloss.en: before a period of time has passed

words.example: You should receive a reply within seven days.

gloss.en: a man with magic powers in stories

words.example: The old wizard cast a powerful spell.

gloss.en: a feeling of surprise and pleasure

words.example: He retained a childlike sense of wonder.

gloss.en: the soft hair that covers sheep

words.example: Sheep were kept for their wool and meat.

gloss.en: having a job for which you are paid

words.example: the working population

gloss.en: damaged or thin from long use

words.example: He wore an old, worn pair of shoes.

gloss.en: the state of worrying about something

words.example: The threat of losing their jobs is a constant source of worry.

gloss.en: paper or material used to cover something

words.example: She removed the wrapping from the gift.

gloss.en: a watch you wear on your wrist

words.example: He looked at his wristwatch to check the time.

gloss.en: expressed in writing rather than in speech

words.example: Having a written record is very valuable.

gloss.en: an area of land next to a house

words.example: They have a gorgeous old oak tree in their front yard.

gloss.en: exercises for the body and mind from India

words.example: She does yoga every morning to relax.

gloss.en: having lived for only a short time

words.example: Young babies need to be wrapped up warmly.

gloss.en: the time of life when a person is young

words.example: He had been a talented musician in his youth.
